query:
SELECT 
  vm.*,
  mc.colorCode,
  mc.colorName
FROM variant_materials vm
LEFT JOIN material_colors mc ON vm.materialColorId = mc.id
WHERE vm.variantId = 390001
ORDER BY vm.sortOrder;
